about.intro: Software Engineer with experience in the business and financial sector, I develop software solutions designed to grow, scale, and generate real business impact. I have experience in demanding environments where stability, performance, and operational continuity are critical. I have worked on the modernization of complex systems, transforming legacy platforms into modern solutions. My focus is clear: deliver solid software, from scalable systems to implementations focused on efficiently solving specific problems.

valueProps.title: Fintech & Stock Exchange Systems
valueProps.description: Financial APIs with ASP.NET and platform modernization, migration from SOAP legacy to .NET Core with critical business rules.

valueProps.title: Microservices & Async Messaging
valueProps.description: Decoupled architectures with Node.js and FastAPI. Communication via RabbitMQ, containerization with Docker and deployment on Railway.

valueProps.title: Cross-Platform Full Stack
valueProps.description: Backend in C#/.NET, Node.js, and Python. Frontends with Blazor, .NET MAUI, and React — web, desktop, and mobile from a single technical profile.

valueProps.title: Real-Time Systems
valueProps.description: WebSockets + Redis + MongoDB for session management and instant messaging. Secure authentication with JWT and bcrypt.

valueProps.title: Technical Project Management
valueProps.description: Team leadership with Scrum and Kanban in real projects. Sprint planning in Jira, tracking in Trello, and versioning with TFS.

items.title: Software Engineering Degree
items.institution: Universidad de las Fuerzas Armadas ESPE
items.description: Focus on distributed systems, software architecture, data analysis, and agile methodologies

items.title: Microservices Communication System with RabbitMQ
items.description: Decoupled microservices system that uses RabbitMQ for asynchronous communication between services.

items.title: Real-Time Chat Platform
items.description: Complete instant messaging system with chat rooms, secure authentication, and real-time user status. Scalable architecture combining REST API with WebSockets for an interactive experience, using Redis for session management and MongoDB for data persistence.

items.title: Cybersecurity Lab Access Management System
items.description: Microservices-based user management system that enables secure, controlled, and scalable access to a virtual cybersecurity laboratory. The system authenticates and authorizes users, manages active sessions, and controls access to simulated vulnerable environments designed for educational practices, implemented with Node.js and Express.js on the backend, managed under the Scrum agile methodology. The lab connects through a network infrastructure with a MikroTik router and VPN on Ubuntu Server.
